Notes:
March 18


Flight Checklist

1) Watch the stock for at least two minutes

2) Check the source, is there news?

3) Check the price volume, must be above

4) Check maximum spread of a 10 cents (for 1 - 20USD), 2 centrs, very good

4) Have an exit strategy

5) Is there a volatility indicator, minimum threshold?

6) Check the L2

7) Moving average
